name: 4pc Silicone Kitchen Utensil Set Natural Wood - Figmint™
description:
Enhance the versatility of your kitchen with this 4-Piece Kitchen Utensil Set from Figmint™. This set includes a slotted turner, spoon, spatula, and turner that can all resist heat up to 450°F, making them ideal for cooking a variety of dishes. Made of silicone, these utensils feature wooden handles with a varnished finish and built-in holes for easy hanging from a peg or screw.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
